ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "opponent" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., W 2-1, L 0-2) */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., home, away, tournament) */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the game was played */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., friendly, league, tournament) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the game data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent FOREIGN KEY ("opponent") REFERENCES opponents ("opponent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opponents" (
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opponent team */,
  "opponent_name" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the opponent team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the opponent team is based */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the opponent team is based */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the opponent team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opponent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "kills" INTEGER /* Number of kills in the game */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks in the game */,
  "digs" INTEGER /* Number of digs in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists in the game */,
  "service_points" INTEGER /* Number of service points in the game */,
  "aces" INTEGER /* Number of aces in the game */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the game statistics */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistic record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistic record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., outside hitter, middle blocker) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_statistics" (
  "pgs_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player game statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "kills" INTEGER /* Number of kills by the player in the game */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks by the player in the game */,
  "digs" INTEGER /* Number of digs by the player in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player in the game */,
  "service_points" INTEGER /* Number of service points by the player in the game */,
  "aces" INTEGER /* Number of aces by the player in the game */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the player game statistics */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistic record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistic record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pgs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the team is based */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_game_statistics" (
  "tgs_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team game statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the statistic belongs to */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "kills" INTEGER /* Number of kills by the team in the game */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks by the team in the game */,
  "digs" INTEGER /* Number of digs by the team in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the team in the game */,
  "service_points" INTEGER /* Number of service points by the team in the game */,
  "aces" INTEGER /* Number of aces by the team in the game */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the team game statistics */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistic record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistic record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tgs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_game_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_game_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the game data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the game data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
